subject: Re: Warp cannot recognize -?
body:
Hi Wenfei,

Judging from the error message, have a look at how the acquisition times 
are formatted in your .mdoc files.
I remember a case when deviating from a format like this: 10-Feb-21 
 16:36:36   
caused similar problems for me.

Hope this helps,
Florian 

wenfei....@gmail.com schrieb am Mittwoch, 29. März 2023 um 22:09:05 UTC+2:

> Dear all, 
>
> I found that I couldn't export tomograms for imod in warp after initial 
> processing. It said " String was not recognized as a valid DateTime.". Has 
> anyone encountered this before? If so, how to solve this? 
> I am wondering if my file name is abc-efd-001-_000.tif, and warp cannot 
> recognize "-"/ 
> I am using version 1.0.9
>
> Thanks in advance.
>
> Best,
> Wenfei
>
